posts.author: kent_storyteller
posts.desc: When I was 23 I quit my job with no plan. I had $4k saved and a one-way ticket. The first month I lived out of a hostel. Last year I finally went back home and realized how much I had changed. Here's what I learned. #storytime

posts.author: tipsdaily
posts.desc:
5 things you didn't know about coffee 👇
1. It's a fruit
2. Decaf still has caffeine
3. Light roast has more caffeine
4. Espresso has less than drip
5. Coffee can go bad

posts.author: fitness_skits
posts.desc: Client: I'm doing 6 days of cardio for fat loss. Coach: Here's why that's destroying your hypertrophy. The real reason most people fail at body recomp is protein. Plot twist — it's not what you think.
